description: A feature spec template for a behavior-preserving restructuring: an explicit inventory of behavior that must not change, refactor boundaries, an incremental plan with safe checkpoints, regression tests, rollback points, and measurable completion criteria.

variables.name: componentName
variables.description: The component, module, or subsystem being restructured (e.g. "billing").

examples: specbridge template apply refactoring --name extract-billing-module --var componentName=billing
